testcase.name: getPatientById_success
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: updatePatientById_partialUpdate_nullFieldsIgnored
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-21T10:48:48.704+05:30 INFO 8116 --- [patient-service] [ main] c.h.m.p.service.PatientServiceImpl : Updating patient ID: 1 2026-05-21T10:48:48.706+05:30 INFO 8116 --- [patient-service] [ main] c.h.m.p.service.PatientServiceImpl : Patient updated successfully: Kumar Updated

testcase.name: registerPatient_success
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-21T10:48:48.716+05:30 INFO 8116 --- [patient-service] [ main] c.h.m.p.service.PatientServiceImpl : Registering patient: Santhoshkumar

testcase.name: updatePatientById_notFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-21T10:48:48.731+05:30 INFO 8116 --- [patient-service] [ main] c.h.m.p.service.PatientServiceImpl : Updating patient ID: 99

testcase.name: updatePatientById_success
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-21T10:48:48.761+05:30 INFO 8116 --- [patient-service] [ main] c.h.m.p.service.PatientServiceImpl : Updating patient ID: 1 2026-05-21T10:48:48.761+05:30 INFO 8116 --- [patient-service] [ main] c.h.m.p.service.PatientServiceImpl : Patient updated successfully: Kumar Updated

testcase.name: deletePatientById_notFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-21T10:48:48.772+05:30 ERROR 8116 --- [patient-service] [ main] c.h.m.p.service.PatientServiceImpl : Patient not found: ID 99

testcase.name: getPatientById_notFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-21T10:48:48.810+05:30 ERROR 8116 --- [patient-service] [ main] c.h.m.p.service.PatientServiceImpl : Patient not found: ID 99
